fields.name: RB_UC_DMA_EN
fields.description: DMA enable and DMA interrupt enable for USB

fields.name: RB_UC_CLR_ALL
fields.description: force clear FIFO and count of USB

fields.name: RB_UC_RESET_SIE
fields.description: force reset USB SIE, need software clear

fields.name: RB_UC_INT_BUSY
fields.description: enable automatic responding busy for device mode or automatic pause for host mode during interrupt flag UIF_TRANSFER valid

fields.name: RB_UC_DEV_PU_EN
fields.description: USB device enable and internal pullup resistance enable

fields.name: RB_UC_SPEED_TYPE
fields.description: enable USB low speed: 00=full speed, 01=high speed, 10 =low speed

fields.name: RB_UC_HOST_MODE
fields.description: enable USB host mode: 0=device mode, 1=host mode

fields.name: bUH_TX_BUS_RESET
fields.description: USB host bus reset status

fields.name: bUH_TX_BUS_SUSPEND
fields.description: the host sends hang sigal

fields.name: bUH_TX_BUS_RESUME
fields.description: host wake up device

fields.name: bUH_REMOTE_WKUP
fields.description: the remoke wake-up

fields.name: bUH_PHY_SUSPENDM
fields.description: USB-PHY thesuspended state the internal USB-PLL is turned off

fields.name: bUH_SOF_FREE
fields.description: the bus is idle

fields.name: bUH_SOF_EN
fields.description: automatically generate the SOF packet enabling control bit

fields.name: RB_UIE_BUS_RST__RB_UIE_DETECT
fields.description: enable interrupt for USB bus reset event for USB device mode;enable interrupt for USB device detected event for USB host mode

fields.name: RB_UIE_TRANSFER
fields.description: enable interrupt for USB transfer completion

fields.name: RB_UIE_SUSPEND
fields.description: enable interrupt for USB suspend or resume event

fields.name: RB_UIE_SOF_ACT
fields.description: indicate host SOF timer action status for USB host

fields.name: RB_UIE_FIFO_OV
fields.description: enable interrupt for FIFO overflow

fields.name: RB_UIE_SETUP_ACT
fields.description: indicate host SETUP timer action status for USB host

fields.name: RB_UIE_ISO_ACT
fields.description: enable interrupt for NAK responded for USB device mode

fields.name: RB_UIE_DEV_NAK
fields.description: enable interrupt for NAK responded for USB device mode

fields.name: MASK_USB_ADDR
fields.description: bit mask for USB device address

fields.name: RB_UDA_GP_BIT
fields.description: general purpose bit

fields.name: USB_FRAME_NO
fields.description: USB_FRAME_NO

fields.name: USB_SYS_MOD
fields.description: USB_SYS_MOD

fields.name: USB_WAKEUP
fields.description: remote resume

fields.name: USB_LINESTATE
fields.description: USB_LINESTATE

fields.name: USB_SPEED_TYPE
fields.description: USB_SPEED_TYPE

fields.name: RB_UMS_SPLIT_CAN
fields.description: RO, indicate device attached status on USB host

fields.name: RB_UMS_ATTACH
fields.description: RO, indicate UDM level saved at device attached to USB host

fields.name: RB_UMS_SUSPEND
fields.description: RO, indicate USB suspend status

fields.name: RB_UMS_BUS_RESET
fields.description: RO, indicate USB bus reset status

fields.name: RB_UMS_R_FIFO_RDY
fields.description: RO, indicate USB receiving FIFO ready status (not empty)

fields.name: RB_UMS_SIE_FREE
fields.description: RO, indicate USB SIE free status

fields.name: RB_UMS_SOF_ACT
fields.description: RO, indicate host SOF timer action status for USB host

fields.name: RB_UMS_SOF_PRES
fields.description: RO, indicate host SOF timer presage status

fields.name: RB_UIF_BUS_RST
fields.description: RB_UIF_BUS_RST

fields.name: RB_UIF_TRANSFER
fields.description: USB transfer completion interrupt flag, direct bit address clear or write 1 to clear

fields.name: RB_UIF_SUSPEND
fields.description: USB suspend or resume event interrupt flag, direct bit address clear or write 1 to clear

fields.name: RB_UIF_HST_SOF
fields.description: host SOF timer interrupt flag for USB host, direct bit address clear or write 1 to clear

fields.name: RB_UIF_FIFO_OV
fields.description: FIFO overflow interrupt flag for USB, direct bit address clear or write 1 to clear

fields.name: RB_U_SETUP_ACT
fields.description: USB_SETUP_ACT

fields.name: UIF_ISO_ACT
fields.description: UIF_ISO_ACT

fields.name: RB_U_IS_NAK
fields.description: RO, indicate current USB transfer is NAK received

fields.name: MASK_UIS_H_RES__MASK_UIS_ENDP
fields.description: RO, bit mask of current transfer handshake response for USB host mode: 0000=no response, time out from device, others=handshake response PID received;RO, bit mask of current transfer endpoint number for USB device mode

fields.name: MASK_UIS_TOKEN
fields.description: RO, bit mask of current token PID code received for USB device mode

fields.name: RB_UIS_TOG_OK
fields.description: RO, indicate current USB transfer toggle is OK

fields.name: RB_UIS_IS_NAK
fields.description: RO, indicate current USB transfer is NAK received for USB device mode

fields.name: R16_USB_RX_LEN
fields.description: length of received bytes
